title: ichnocarpus cymosus
intro: Ichnocarpus cymosus, also known as the shrubby false pith, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The medicinal properties of Ichnocarpus cymosus include its ability to act as a laxative and to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and relieve gastrointestinal issues. Ichnocarpus cymosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in various applications.
